subcodes.first_line: O My leaf, My handmaiden, My spiritual one! Verily, He hath made mention of thee, from before time and unto eternity, with a fragrance that shall never cease [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقتی و یا امتی و یا روحانی انه ذکرک من قبل و من بعد بما لاینقطع عرفه و
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @prayer for women, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
